description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image. Define stages build, test, upload, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew jar and a javadoc job that runs ./gradlew javadoc, publishing the generated docs in build/docs as an artifact that expires after one day. In the test stage add a test job that runs ./gradlew check and stores the test reports in build/reports as an artifact that expires after one week and is always uploaded. In the upload stage add a codacy job that runs only on the master branch and executes ./gradlew jacocoTestReportUpload. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs only on master, always runs, moves the build directory to public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
